top_stories.title: White House says layoffs 'imminent' with no end to shutdown in sight
top_stories.description: As a bitter standoff between Republicans and Democrats plays out, there is little sign that either side is willing to budge.

top_stories.title: Israeli naval ships intercept Gaza-bound flotilla
top_stories.description: Climate activist Greta Thunberg is among activists on the Global Sumud Flotilla being taken to an Israeli port.

top_stories.title: Four ways this US government shutdown could end
top_stories.description: At some point, public pressure and political pain will see one side yield to bring this latest US government shutdown to an end.

top_stories.title: Dame Jane Goodall remembered as a 'true hero for the planet'
top_stories.description: Leonardo DiCaprio and Barack Obama are among those paying tribute to the leading conservationist.

top_stories.title: Dozens feared dead in Indonesia school collapse, officials say
top_stories.description: There are reportedly "no signs of life" under the wreckage, where 59 people are still missing.

quick_reads.title: Musk becomes world's first half-trillionaire
quick_reads.description: The rise has been driven by a sharp increase in the value of his electric car company Tesla.

quick_reads.title: Israel 'tightens siege' of Gaza City as Hamas reviews Trump peace plan
quick_reads.description: The defence minister warns Palestinians to leave, saying those remaining will be considered "terrorists and supporters of terror".

quick_reads.title: 'None of us have ever asked for special treatment' - female veterans respond to Hegseth
quick_reads.description: The US Secretary of Defense said he wants a return to the 'male standard' for combat roles. Woman veterans say the standards were never different.

quick_reads.title: A new China tech visa has caught India's attention - now locals aren't happy
quick_reads.description: China's aim to attract global talent comes as the US is making it harder to bring in foreign workers.

quick_reads.title: Afghans rejoice as internet returns after Taliban blackout
quick_reads.description: A 48-hour shutdown imposed by the Taliban government hit firms, flights and risked further isolating women.

top_stories.title: Meet the Arc spacecraft: it aims to deliver cargo anywhere in the world in an hour
top_stories.description: "The key discriminator is, does this make a difference in the moment it's needed?"

top_stories.title: That annoying SMS phish you just got may have come from a box like this
top_stories.description: Smishers looking for new infrastructure are getting creative.

top_stories.title: Megafauna was the meat of choice for South American hunters
top_stories.description: Giant sloths are extinct in part because they were tasty and nutritious.

top_stories.title: OpenAI mocks Musk’s math in suit over iPhone/ChatGPT integration
top_stories.description: xAI's claim that Apple gave ChatGPT a monopoly on prompts is “baseless,” OpenAI says.

top_stories.title: Hyundai gives the Ioniq 5 a huge price cut for model-year 2026
top_stories.description: The Korean automaker's price cut comes in as the clean vehicle tax credit dies.

quick_reads.title: Cable nostalgia persists as streaming gets more expensive, fragmented
quick_reads.description: Cord reviving isn't common but points to discontent with today's streaming options.

quick_reads.title: OpenAI’s Sora 2 lets users insert themselves into AI videos with sound
quick_reads.description: Sora social app launches with deepfake-style "cameos" and feed controls.

quick_reads.title: FCC chairman leads “cruel” vote to take Wi-Fi access away from school kids
quick_reads.description: FCC Republicans kill funding for Wi-Fi hotspot lending and Wi-Fi on school buses.

quick_reads.title: Can today’s AI video models accurately model how the real world works?
quick_reads.description: New research shows highly inconsistent performance on a variety of physical reasoning tasks.

quick_reads.title: Trailer for del Toro’s Frankenstein is pure macabre mythology
quick_reads.description: "My maker told his tale. And I will tell you mine."

top_stories.title: Government shutdown means opportune timing for Neptune Flood IPO
top_stories.description: Neptune Insurance, the nation's largest private flood insurance, goes public on the New York Stock Exchange Wednesday.

top_stories.title: Record EV sales lead GM, Ford to 8% increases in Q3 U.S. auto sales
top_stories.description: EV sales during the third quarter are expected to be a record, ahead of federal incentives of up to $7,500 ending in September.

top_stories.title: Trump's threats against late-night TV could spell more trouble for advertisers
top_stories.description: The recent upheaval in late-night programming has shown a spotlight on ratings and revenue — and spurred questions of political influence.

top_stories.title: Ford CEO Jim Farley eyes further improvements after five years of ‘surprises,’ including investor returns
top_stories.description: Ford CEO Jim Farley marks his fifth anniversary as CEO at the automaker on Wednesday.

top_stories.title: Peloton revamps equipment, launches commercial unit and raises prices ahead of holidays
top_stories.description: Peloton is revamping its product assortment and raising prices for its subscription and hardware ahead of the holiday shopping season.

quick_reads.title: States sue Zillow, Redfin for alleged antitrust violation in online rental housing
quick_reads.description: Attorneys general from New York, Virginia, Arizona, Connecticut and Washington filed a lawsuit against Redfin and Zillow on Wednesday.

quick_reads.title: FTC sues Zillow and Redfin, alleging antitrust violation in online rental listings
quick_reads.description: The FTC alleges the companies violated federal antitrust laws when Zillow paid Redfin $100 million to essentially re-host Zillow multifamily rental listings on Redfin.
